title: CoordinateIdMap
description: Per-residue and per-atom mapping from canonical mmCIF identifiers to derived PDB chain/resid/icode tuples. Emitted by StructureIngest when mmCIF is canonical. Topology decisions are keyed by canonical IDs throughout the system; the bridge translates to derived IDs only at pdb2gmx invocation time, and the topology agent verifies the answer-to-residue mapping per-prompt against this file. Required to be injective for every topology-affecting residue; full-coordinate injectivity is enforced when feasible per R5 nitpick #1.

injectivity.description: verified = every residue (and atom, when computed) is uniquely mappable from canonical→derived. lossy_with_diff = at least one collision occurred; see lossy_diff.

lossy_diff.description: Present iff injectivity=lossy_with_diff. Each entry describes a canonical-side residue/atom that collides with another under the derived PDB encoding.
